venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room with open-seating service for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Daily-changing menus feature international cuisine with Relais & Châteaux standards. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian and Mediterranean restaurant serving buffet breakfast and lunch on the terrace, plus full table-service dinner with an à la carte Italian menu. Complimentary.

venues.name: Pool Bar & Grill
venues.description: Casual poolside grill serving light lunches, burgers, salads, fresh-made sandwiches, and grilled items throughout the day.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: 24-hour complimentary in-suite dining from the full Restaurant menu. Breakfast delivered at your chosen time each morning.

venues.name: Spaccanapoli
venues.description: Casual Neapolitan pizzeria serving wood-fired pizzas and classic Italian street food. Complimentary; open for lunch and dinner.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Kitchen
venues.description: Sea and Land Taste — Silversea's culinary programme celebrating local ingredients and regional food culture. Menu changes with each voyage to reflect the ports visited.

venues.name: Atlantide
venues.description: Signature specialty restaurant featuring seafood and prime meats with an elegant, destination-inspired menu. Complimentary; reservations required.

venues.name: Silver Note
venues.description: Jazz-inspired supper club and bar featuring live music, specialty cocktails, and a small-plate dinner menu. Complimentary; advance reservations recommended.

venues.name: Kaiseki
venues.description: Traditional Japanese multi-course tasting experience with seasonal ingredients, precise presentation, and optional sake pairing. Premium charge applies; reservations required.
